acceptance.assertion: A context pack includes task profile, freshness, snippets/ranges, answer-compliance template, and explicit non-claims.
The wrapper handles Lenskit query output shape without assuming a bare top-level results array.
The context pack consumes or explicitly degrades when resolved evidence query results with snippets, ranges and citations are unavailable.

goal: Add typed preflight/query/range/context-pack wrappers so delegated agents receive bounded rLens context instead of raw dumps by default.

metadata.reconcile_note: Depends on RPU-V1-T001 so Grabowski context-pack work does not paper over the missing resolved-content query surface.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in Grabowski PR #105 after prerequisite hardening PRs #103 and #104 were merged. The rLens context pack now normalizes Lenskit resolved_evidence.hits, carries snippets/ranges/citation ids/canonical authority/live repo address metadata, and explicitly degrades when resolved evidence is unavailable.
validation: Grabowski PR #105 GitHub CI passed validate (3.10) and validate (3.12).
Local: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_rlens_bundles.py tests/test_grips.py tests/test_operator_context.py tests/test_control_plane.py tests/test_tasks.py -> 200 passed, 30 subtests passed.

verified_acceptance.context-pack: rlens_context_pack includes task_profile, freshness, bounded_evidence snippets/ranges/citation_ids, preflight answer_compliance_template, context_ref, and explicit does_not_establish non-claims.
verified_acceptance.query-shape-normalized: rlens query wrappers normalize source_citation_projection.items, resolved_evidence.hits, query_result.results, top-level results and bare result arrays rather than assuming a bare top-level results array.
verified_acceptance.resolved-evidence-input: resolved_evidence.hits are consumed directly; missing snippets/ranges/citations produce bounded_evidence.resolved_evidence_status=degraded with degradation_reason instead of silent success.

title: Build rLens context pack bridge
